campaigns.name: Lucky Day — Daily Feng Shui Almanac
campaigns.prompt: A daily Chinese feng-shui almanac show: 12 zodiac-animal avatars plus a Feng Shui Master, one contemplative ink-wash scene each, computed deterministically from the date.

movies.title: The Wise Sage
movies.style: Traditional Chinese ink-wash painting (国画/水墨) with gold-leaf accents on deep cinnabar red; a single dignified zodiac-animal spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk, auspicious cloud and lantern motifs, incense smoke, soft volumetric glow, calligraphic brushwork, contemplative and luminous.

customCast.name: Rat
customCast.description: Rat zodiac avatar (鼠): a nimble, clever spirit-creature, bright-eyed and whiskered, draped in red and gold silk, subtle rat motifs, auspicious clouds, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Ox
customCast.description: Ox zodiac avatar (牛): a steady, powerful spirit-creature with broad horns, calm and patient, red and gold silk, plowed-field motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Tiger
customCast.description: Tiger zodiac avatar (虎): a bold, striped spirit-creature, fierce and noble, red and gold silk, bamboo and wind motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Rabbit
customCast.description: Rabbit zodiac avatar (兔): a gentle, graceful spirit-creature with long ears, serene, red and gold silk, moon and osmanthus motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Dragon
customCast.description: Dragon zodiac avatar (龙): a regal, coiling spirit-creature with flowing whiskers, auspicious and commanding, red and gold silk, cloud and pearl motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Snake
customCast.description: Snake zodiac avatar (蛇): a sleek, wise spirit-creature, mysterious and elegant, red and gold silk, coiling water motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Horse
customCast.description: Horse zodiac avatar (马): a spirited, galloping spirit-creature with flowing mane, free and energetic, red and gold silk, mountain-wind motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Goat
customCast.description: Goat zodiac avatar (羊): a tender, artistic spirit-creature with curled horns, peaceful, red and gold silk, meadow and flower motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Monkey
customCast.description: Monkey zodiac avatar (猴): a clever, lively spirit-creature with a quick grin, witty, red and gold silk, peach and branch motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Rooster
customCast.description: Rooster zodiac avatar (鸡): a proud, vivid spirit-creature with a bright crest, confident, red and gold silk, dawn and chrysanthemum motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Dog
customCast.description: Dog zodiac avatar (狗): a loyal, alert spirit-creature with kind eyes, steadfast, red and gold silk, gateway and lantern motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: Pig
customCast.description: Pig zodiac avatar (猪): a content, gentle spirit-creature, generous and warm, red and gold silk, harvest and abundance motifs, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork.

customCast.name: The Feng Shui Master
customCast.description: The Feng Shui Master: a calm white-bearded sage and narrator who opens and closes the day, flowing slate-grey robe, kind ancient eyes, holding a brush or compass (罗盘), incense smoke and gold lanterns around him, gold-leaf on deep cinnabar red, traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) brushwork, dignified and luminous.

movies.plot:
- Interior of a mountain shrine wrapped in dawn cloud, rendered as a traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) painting — gold leaf on deep cinnabar red. The Feng Shui Master, a calm white-bearded sage in a slate-grey robe, faces the lens like a trusted teacher and reads the day's almanac: a Water day under the Ox. A slow Ken Burns drift over rising incense smoke; the palette is red and gold, the mood unhurried and certain. This frame sets the tone for the twelve readings that follow. The Feng Shui Master says: "今日辛丑水日，宜清心寡欲，诸事缓行；吉方在东，凶方在东北"

  - Interior/exterior: a scholar's study stacked with bound scrolls, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Rat zodiac avatar (鼠) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Rat receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the southeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Rat says: "属鼠者，宜行善，忌冲动；东南方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a tea house balcony above a misted river, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Ox zodiac avatar (牛) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. Today's ruling sign — its hour is auspicious. The day is a Water day; the Ox receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the west. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Ox says: "属牛者，宜守成，忌贪进；西方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a mountain shrine wrapped in dawn cloud, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Tiger zodiac avatar (虎) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Tiger receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the east. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Tiger says: "属虎者，宜早眠，忌借贷；东方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a bamboo grove bending in a quiet wind, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Rabbit zodiac avatar (兔) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Rabbit receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the north. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Rabbit says: "属兔者，宜求财，忌口舌；北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a bamboo grove bending in a quiet wind, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Dragon zodiac avatar (龙) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Dragon receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the southeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Dragon says: "属龙者，宜整理，忌远行；东南方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a mountain shrine wrapped in dawn cloud, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Snake zodiac avatar (蛇) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Snake receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the northwest. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Snake says: "属蛇者，宜进取，忌贪进；西北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a bamboo grove bending in a quiet wind, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Horse zodiac avatar (马) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Horse receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the southwest. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Horse says: "属马者，宜守成，忌冲动；西南方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a scholar's study stacked with bound scrolls, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Goat zodiac avatar (羊) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. Today's clash sign — tread carefully and avoid big moves. The day is a Water day; the Goat receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the northeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Goat says: "属羊者，宜早眠，忌借贷；东北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a mountain shrine wrapped in dawn cloud, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Monkey zodiac avatar (猴) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Monkey receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the northeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Monkey says: "属猴者，宜守成，忌轻信；东北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a bamboo grove bending in a quiet wind, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Rooster zodiac avatar (鸡) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Rooster receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the northeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Rooster says: "属鸡者，宜早眠，忌熬夜；东北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a moon-gate courtyard where incense smoke curls, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Dog zodiac avatar (狗) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Dog receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the northeast. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Dog says: "属狗者，宜整理，忌动土；东北方利财"

  - Interior/exterior: a temple threshold where koi circle a still pond, in traditional Chinese ink-wash (国画) style, gold accents on deep red. We find the Pig zodiac avatar (猪) — a dignified spirit-creature in red-and-gold silk — composed at the center of the frame. The day is a Water day; the Pig receives its daily counsel, wealth gathering toward the west. A slow contemplative Ken Burns drift; auspicious clouds and a single gold seal settle as the reading lands. The drama is quiet and internal — a daily omen the viewer recognizes for their own sign. Pig says: "属猪者，宜整理，忌动土；西方利财"

  - Exterior of a scholar's study stacked with bound scrolls at dusk, the same ink-wash (国画) red-and-gold palette. The Feng Shui Master draws the twelve readings back together, lowers both hands in a calm blessing, and a single gold lantern lifts as the incense smoke thins. A slow Ken Burns pull-back until the whole courtyard is in frame — a quiet, certain button on the day. The Feng Shui Master says: "愿诸位顺遂安康，明日再会"

scenes.title: Morning Almanac Reading
scenes.story: The Feng Shui Master, a sage in a slate-grey robe, reads the almanac. Incense smoke drifts over a serene mountain shrine in red and gold hues.
scenes.dialogue: 今日辛丑水日，宜清心寡欲，诸事缓行；吉方在东，凶方在东北

scenes.title: Daily Omen in the Scholar's Study
scenes.story: A serene scholar's study filled with scrolls, red-and-gold Rat zodiac avatar at center. Water day; wealth towards southeast. Clouds and gold seal settle as Rat's omen unfolds.
scenes.dialogue: 属鼠者，宜行善，忌冲动；东南方利财

scenes.title: Quiet Contemplation at the Tea House Balcony
scenes.story: The scene captures the serene atmosphere of the tea house balcony overlooking a misted river. The Ox zodiac avatar stands at the center, exuding patience and strength. The setting is bathed in traditional Chinese ink-wash style with gold accents on deep red. The day is Water, with wealth flowing westward. A moment of introspection and foresight.
scenes.dialogue: 属牛者，宜守成，忌贪进；西方利财

scenes.title: Tiger's Daily Counsel
scenes.story: The mountain shrine shrouded in dawn cloud, Tiger stands regal in red-and-gold silk. Eastern wealth beckons on this Water day. A slow Ken Burns reveals an auspicious setting for Tiger's omen.
scenes.dialogue: 属虎者，宜早眠，忌借贷；东方利财

scenes.title: Rabbit's Daily Counsel
scenes.story: Amidst a serene bamboo grove in a quiet wind, the Rabbit avatar stands gracefully. The setting sun casts a golden hue on the red-and-gold silk. As the Rabbit receives its daily counsel for wealth toward the north, a sense of quiet contemplation fills the air.
scenes.dialogue: 属兔者，宜求财，忌口舌；北方利财

scenes.title: Dragon's Daily Omen
scenes.story: Amidst a bamboo grove swaying gently in the wind, the Dragon, regal and majestic in red-and-gold silk, receives its counsel for the day. An aura of tranquility envelops the scene, as auspicious clouds drift by and a single gold seal settles, signifying prosperity and wisdom.
scenes.dialogue: 属龙者，宜整理，忌远行；东南方利财

scenes.title: Wisdom of the Serpent
scenes.story: The mountain shrine's serenity envelops the Snake avatar in contemplation. The red-and-gold silk shimmers under the dawn cloud, embodying elegance and mystery. The Snake gazes westward, embodying ambition and caution in its dignified stance.
scenes.dialogue: 属蛇者，宜进取，忌贪进；西北方利财

scenes.title: Quiet Contemplation in the Bamboo Grove
scenes.story: Amidst a bamboo grove swaying gently in the wind, the Horse zodiac avatar stands at the center, exuding tranquility and grace. The scene captures a moment of introspection as the Horse receives its daily counsel, feeling the pull of wealth toward the southwest.
scenes.dialogue: 属马者，宜守成，忌冲动；西南方利财

scenes.title: Goat's Daily Counsel
scenes.story: The scholar's study bathed in soft golden light, scrolls neatly arranged, Goat zodiac avatar at the center exuding peace. An air of caution and contemplation fills the room as the day's counsel unfolds.
scenes.dialogue: 属羊者，宜早眠，忌借贷；东北方利财

scenes.title: Monkey's Daily Omen
scenes.story: Interior of a mountain shrine at dawn, enveloped in mist. The Monkey zodiac avatar in red-and-gold silk stands poised, receiving counsel for the day. Auspicious clouds swirl as a gold seal settles, signifying fortune in the northeast.
scenes.dialogue: 属猴者，宜守成，忌轻信；东北方利财

scenes.title: Morning Serenity
scenes.story: A tranquil bamboo grove sways gently in the wind, bathed in a soft glow of traditional Chinese ink-wash style with gold accents. The Rooster zodiac avatar stands proudly at the center, receiving its daily counsel for wealth toward the northeast. The scene exudes peace and introspection, inviting viewers to connect with their own signs.
scenes.dialogue: 属鸡者，宜早眠，忌熬夜；东北方利财

scenes.title: Quiet Morning Reflection
scenes.story: The moon-gate courtyard is veiled in swirling incense smoke, casting shadows on the red-and-gold Dog zodiac avatar. The Dog sits stoically, embodying loyalty and alertness, as the water day's wisdom gently infuses the air.
scenes.dialogue: 属狗者，宜整理，忌动土；东北方利财

scenes.title: Harmony at the Temple Threshold
scenes.story: At the temple threshold, koi gracefully circle a serene pond as the Pig zodiac avatar stands in regal red-and-gold silk. The scene exudes tranquility, with the day's guidance settling in a gentle, introspective manner.
scenes.dialogue: 属猪者，宜整理，忌动土；西方利财

scenes.title: Closing Blessing
scenes.story: The scholar's study at dusk, scrolls stacked under red-and-gold hues. The Feng Shui Master unites the readings, hands in blessing. A gold lantern rises amidst fading incense, courtyard revealed in a Ken Burns pull-back, serene closure.
scenes.dialogue: 愿诸位顺遂安康，明日再会
